recommendations.title: Piranha
recommendations.overview: When flesh-eating piranhas are accidentally released into a summer resort's rivers, the guests become their next meal.

recommendations.title: X
recommendations.overview: A veteran call girl and a runaway prostitute witness a murder which sends them on an out-of-control roller coaster ride through the twilight zone of sex-for-sale.

recommendations.title: Waiting for the Hearse
recommendations.overview: Mama Cora, who is almost eighty years old, has three sons and a daughter. She lives with one of them, who has serious financial problems. The family meets one day to celebrate an anniversary meal, and that is when the problem arises: which of them wi

recommendations.title: Dark Glasses
recommendations.overview: Diana, a high-class prostitute trying to escape from a serial killer, suffers a car accident that leaves her blind and kills the family of Chin, a ten-year-old boy.

recommendations.title: Babette's Feast
recommendations.overview: A French housekeeper with a mysterious past brings quiet revolution in the form of one exquisite meal to a circle of starkly pious villagers in late 19th century Denmark.

recommendations.title: Screamboat
recommendations.overview: A late-night boat ride turns into a desperate fight for survival in New York City when a mischievous mouse becomes a monstrous reality.

recommendations.title: Winnie-the-Pooh Goes Visiting
recommendations.overview: The second of the Soviet Winnie-the-Pooh series. This one had Pooh and Piglet visiting Rabbit for a meal with honey.

recommendations.title: Wind Chill
recommendations.overview: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

recommendations.title: Dashcam
recommendations.overview: At the start of the pandemic, an indulgent and self-deluded livestreaming improv musician abandons L.A. for London, steals her ex-bandmate's car, and makes the fateful decision to give a ride to an elderly woman who is not what she seems.

recommendations.title: Sieranevada
